description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push and on a weekly schedule. Configure a job that runs on ubuntu-latest with read-only repository permissions and write ID token permissions. The job should use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9-3.13) with environment variables for AWS Athena settings. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, set up Python with uv and caching, and optionally use actions/setup-python for Python 3.13. Configure AWS credentials using an OIDC role, then run make tool and make tox for testing.
